title: Rank SSOT 039 — single cut + types in plan-context-rank
description: ISS-039: cutRankedForRecall 手写 topK+floor 与 applyRankCapAndFloor 重复；RankMode/RankOptions 在 plan-context-rank.ts 与 plan-context-scoring.ts 双定义。统一为 rank 模块 SSOT，facade 继续 re-export。
action: Delete RankMode/RankOptions type declarations from packages/server/src/services/plan-context-scoring.ts; import type { RankMode, RankOptions } and applyRankCapAndFloor from ./plan-context-rank.js; rewrite cutRankedForRecall to thin wrapper: return applyRankCapAndFloor(rankedScored, 'recall', options, scoringContext.queryTerms.length > 0); keep rankDescriptionItems using applyRankCapAndFloor; ensure plan-context.ts continues export type { RankMode, RankOptions } and cutRankedForRecall without dual definitions.

criteria: rg -n 'export type RankMode|export type RankOptions' packages/server/src/services/plan-context-scoring.ts returns no matches
rg -n 'export type RankMode|export type RankOptions' packages/server/src/services/plan-context-rank.ts finds the sole definitions
cutRankedForRecall body calls applyRankCapAndFloor and does not reimplement rankedScored.slice(0, topK) + relevanceFloor filter inline
pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server exec vitest run src/services/plan-context.test.ts src/services/plan-context-scope-rank.test.ts src/services/recall.test.ts exits 0
convergence.verification: rg dual-type/cut patterns; vitest plan-context* + recall; tsc --noEmit
convergence.definition_of_done: rank cut 与 Rank types 单一来源；cutRankedForRecall 为薄包装；公开 facade 类型导出不变；ISS-039 可 close。

files.change: Remove dual type exports; cutRankedForRecall delegates to applyRankCapAndFloor(rankedScored, 'recall', options, hasQuery)
Confirm remains SSOT; expand comments if needed only
Prefer importing RankMode/RankOptions from plan-context-rank.js (or re-export chain that does not redefine); keep public export type surface identical

implementation: Read applyRankCapAndFloor signature and cutRankedForRecall current body (lines ~389-403)
In plan-context-scoring.ts: remove export type RankMode/RankOptions blocks; import type { RankMode, RankOptions } from plan-context-rank.js (applyRankCapAndFloor already imported)
Replace cutRankedForRecall implementation with: const hasQuery = scoringContext.queryTerms.length > 0; return applyRankCapAndFloor(rankedScored, 'recall', options, hasQuery);
Adjust plan-context.ts imports so RankMode/RankOptions come from rank SSOT (directly or via scoring re-export without local defs)
Run plan-context + scope-rank + recall tests and tsc --noEmit

commands: pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server exec vitest run src/services/plan-context.test.ts src/services/plan-context-scope-rank.test.ts src/services/recall.test.ts

reference.pattern: rankDescriptionItems already delegates to applyRankCapAndFloor — mirror that for cutRankedForRecall

rationale.chosen_approach: Thin wrapper preserves call sites (cutRankedForRecall(scoringContext,...)) while eliminating algorithm drift; types live in rank module only
decision_factors: must land before further scoring slice to avoid re-duplication
prior ARCH-002 was skipped in 011/020 fix-loop
rationale.tradeoffs: cutRankedForRecall hardcodes mode 'recall' which matches current call sites

risks: Subtle hasQuery semantics must match queryTerms.length > 0 used today
Import cycles if plan-context-rank starts importing scoring — keep rank pure
